title: Importing Large SQL Dumps into AWS RDS
description: RDS imports can be slow and error-prone. Here’s how to make large dumps manageable.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: Large dumps into RDS can trigger timeouts or fail on oversized statements.

items: Split the dump into smaller files

content.text: Related: **MySQL Error 2013: Lost Connection During Query**.

content.title: Prep dumps for RDS
content.text: Split large SQL files before import.

faq.question: Can I upload a single giant dump?
faq.answer: It often fails. Smaller chunks are more reliable.
